originalTitle: Stock futures jump, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
summary: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.
content: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.
chineseTitle: 特朗普称美国已与伊朗达成和平协议，股市期货上涨，油价下跌
chineseSummary: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示美国已同意与伊朗达成和平协议，这显然结束了长达数月关闭霍尔木兹海峡并导致全球经济陷入石油冲击的敌对行动，随后油价下跌，美国股指期货上涨。
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示美国已同意与伊朗达成和平协议，这显然结束了长达数月关闭霍尔木兹海峡并导致全球经济陷入石油冲击的敌对行动，随后油价下跌，美国股指期货上涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
